languages.text: "Это вопрос субординации, Ваша Светлость. И дисциплины".
"It's down to chain of command, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. And discipline."
languages.original_text: "Это вопрос субординации, Ваша Светлость. И дисциплины".

traits.locale_text: "It's down to chain of command, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. And discipline."
"It's down to chain of command, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. And discipline."

languages.text: 「それは、命令の連鎖と、規律の問題です、御{mf|殿|女}様」
languages.original_text: "It's down to chain of command, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. And discipline."

traits.locale_text: 「それは、命令の連鎖と、規律の問題です、御{mf|殿|女}様。」

languages.text: "Emir komuta zinciri bunu gerektiriyor {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Bir de disiplin tabii."
languages.original_text: "It's down to chain of command, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. And discipline."

traits.locale_text: "Emir komuta zinciri bunu gerektiriyor {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Bir de disiplin tabii."

languages.text: «Es cuestión de respetar la cadena de mando, mi{mf|lord|lady}. Cadena de mando y disciplina».
languages.original_text: "It's down to chain of command, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. And discipline."

traits.locale_text: «Es cuestión de respetar la cadena de mando, mi{mf|lord|lady}. Cadena de mando y disciplina».

languages.text: “说到底，这是指挥链的问题，还有纪律，大人。”
languages.original_text: "It's down to chain of command, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. And discipline."

languages.text: « C'est une question de hiérarchie, Votre Seigneurie, et de discipline. »
languages.original_text: "It's down to chain of command, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. And discipline."

languages.text: "Das ist eine Frage der Befehlskette, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. Und der Disziplin."
